nodes.label: Milestone 6: Receive (รับของเข้า)
nodes.norm_label: milestone 6: receive (รับของเขา)

nodes.label: Prisma Schema — Full Phase 1 Data Model
nodes.norm_label: prisma schema — full phase 1 data model

nodes.label: Consumable (สิ้นเปลือง)
nodes.rationale: Single-use items tracked by lot + quantity. Deducted permanently on dispensing. Examples: cotton, gloves, syringes, medication.

nodes.label: Durable (คงทน)
nodes.rationale: Reusable equipment. May be tracked by quantity or individually via sub-codes. Examples: trays, stethoscopes, blood pressure monitors.

nodes.label: Fixed Asset (ครุพันธุ์)
nodes.rationale: High-value items tracked individually by serial number. Requires annual maintenance. Examples: mannequins, cabinets, beds.

nodes.label: track_individually flag
nodes.rationale: Boolean on each item. true = UI shows sub-codes, staff selects specific items. false = UI shows quantity breakdown, staff enters amount.

nodes.label: Dual Unit System (Issue Unit + Sub Unit)
nodes.rationale: Issue unit for dispensing (box, piece, bag). Sub unit for granular tracking (pill, gram). Conversion factor links them. Staff input in either; system converts.
nodes.norm_label: dual unit system (issue unit + sub unit)

nodes.label: Dispense (ตัดเบิก)
nodes.rationale: Staff removes items from stock for teaching. Consumables: permanent deduction. Durables: marks checked-out with return action.

nodes.label: Receive (รับของเข้า)
nodes.rationale: Adding new stock. Simple add: select item, enter quantity, lot, expiry.

nodes.label: Stock Adjustment
nodes.rationale: Admin corrects stock quantity during periodic checks. Requires reason selection and audit trail.

nodes.label: Maintenance (Fixed Asset)
nodes.rationale: Annual inspection of Fixed Assets. Records date, condition, next maintenance date. Configurable cycle per item.

nodes.label: Item Status Enum
nodes.rationale: available, checked-out, damaged, under-repair, lost, pending-maintenance, disposed.

nodes.label: Location Hierarchy (Room > Cabinet > Shelf)
nodes.rationale: Hierarchical storage location. Flat 3 columns in DB (room, cabinet, shelf). No self-reference.

nodes.label: Role: Admin
nodes.rationale: Full access. Manages master data, users, adjustments, maintenance, reports.

nodes.label: Role: Staff
nodes.rationale: Dispenses items, receives stock, reports damage, views stock levels.

nodes.label: Role: Instructor
nodes.rationale: View-only access to Dashboard, All Items, and Reports (Phase 1).

nodes.label: Phase 1: Stock Management
nodes.rationale: Dispensing, receiving, adjustment, maintenance, reports. No borrow/return.

nodes.label: Phase 2: Borrow/Return (Future)
nodes.rationale: Borrow/return with sets, penalties, overdue tracking, student/teacher access.

nodes.label: QR Code System
nodes.rationale: Generate QR per item (value = item code). Staff scans via camera. Fallback: manual search.

nodes.label: ADR 0001: Dual Tracking Model
nodes.rationale: Single Item table with track_individually boolean. SubItem table at DB level for all items. When false, sub-items auto-managed (hidden). When true, sub-items visible and individually selectable.

nodes.label: ADR 0002: Phase 1 Dispensing Includes Durables
nodes.rationale: Phase 1 dispensing covers both consumables and durables so stock counts stay accurate from day one. Durables use status changes (checked out) with simple return. No formal borrow/return until Phase 2.

nodes.label: ADR 0003: Dual Unit System with Conversion Factor
nodes.rationale: Each item has issue_unit, sub_unit, conversion_factor. Staff inputs in either unit, system stores both. Reports aggregate in sub_units for accuracy.
nodes.norm_label: adr 0003: dual unit system with conversion factor

nodes.label: System Draft Diagram (ร่างระบบ.pdf)
nodes.rationale: Hand-drawn system flow diagrams showing NLU stock management workflows including item categories, dispensing, receiving, QR scanning, and maintenance processes.
nodes.norm_label: system draft diagram (รางระบบ.pdf)

nodes.label: Prisma Model: Item
nodes.rationale: Central entity with code, name, category, trackIndividually flag, dual units, running totals, optional fixed asset fields. Relations to SubItem, Lot, DispenseRecord, ReceiveRecord, etc.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: SubItem
nodes.rationale: Individual tracking within a parent Item. Only created when track_individually=true. Has own status, condition, notes.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: Lot
nodes.rationale: Consumable batch tracking. Groups items received together with shared lotNumber and optional expiryDate. FIFO ordering by expiry.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: DispenseRecord
nodes.rationale: Records item dispensing. Links to Item, optional SubItem/Lot/Subject. Stores both issue unit and sub unit quantities. returnedAt for durable returns.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: ReceiveRecord
nodes.rationale: Records stock receiving. Links to Item and optional Lot. Stores quantity.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: MaintenanceRecord
nodes.rationale: Fixed Asset maintenance logs. Type (preventive/corrective), result, cost, attachments, next maintenance date.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: StockAdjustment
nodes.rationale: Records stock corrections. Previous qty, new qty, reason enum, audit trail.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: ItemStatusLog
nodes.rationale: Audit trail for item/sub-item status changes. Previous/new status, reason, changed by.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: User
nodes.rationale: System user with email, name, role (ADMIN/STAFF/INSTRUCTOR). Linked to dispense, receive, adjustment, and maintenance records.

nodes.label: Prisma Model: Subject
nodes.rationale: Admin-managed subject/activity codes used during dispensing to track which subject/activity stock is used for.

nodes.label: jose JWT Auth Strategy
nodes.rationale: Custom JWT auth using jose library (no next-auth). HS256 signed tokens stored in httpOnly cookies. 24h expiry. Dev: email-only login. Prod: MS Entra ID SSO.

nodes.label: FIFO Lot Selection Strategy
nodes.rationale: Auto-sort lots by expiry date, oldest first. Staff selects lot manually but FIFO order is suggested.

nodes.label: SVG: File Document Icon
nodes.rationale: Generic file/document SVG icon. Depicts a page with content lines and corner fold. Used as default Next.js placeholder asset.

nodes.label: SVG: Vercel Logo
nodes.rationale: Vercel brand logo (triangle mark + text). Default Next.js placeholder asset. Indicates Vercel deployment platform.

nodes.label: SVG: Next.js Logo
nodes.rationale: Next.js framework logotype. Default Next.js placeholder asset.

nodes.label: SVG: Globe/World Icon
nodes.rationale: Globe/earth SVG icon representing web/internet connectivity. Default Next.js placeholder asset.

nodes.label: SVG: Window/Application Icon
nodes.rationale: Browser window/application frame SVG with content dots. Default Next.js placeholder asset.

nodes.label: AGENTS.md: Next.js Breaking Changes Warning
nodes.rationale: Warning that this Next.js version has breaking changes from training data. Must read node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code.

nodes.label: FIFO guidance not enforcement — lots sorted by expiry ascending, staff picks manually
nodes.norm_label: fifo guidance not enforcement — lots sorted by expiry ascending, staff picks manually

nodes.label: Near-expiry lots flagged via reports for management follow-up
nodes.norm_label: near-expiry lots flagged via reports for management follow-up

nodes.label: No server-side lot auto-selection logic needed — simpler API
nodes.norm_label: no server-side lot auto-selection logic needed — simpler api

nodes.label: Dispense tracked durable — sub-item status changes to CHECKED_OUT, item status logged
nodes.norm_label: dispense tracked durable — sub-item status changes to checked_out, item status logged

nodes.label: Dispense consumable with lot — decrement lot quantity and item availableQty with optimistic lock
nodes.norm_label: dispense consumable with lot — decrement lot quantity and item availableqty with optimistic lock

nodes.label: Dispense non-tracked durable — decrement item availableQty only
nodes.norm_label: dispense non-tracked durable — decrement item availableqty only

nodes.label: Dedup check on itemId+lotId+subItemId in dispense request
nodes.norm_label: dedup check on itemid+lotid+subitemid in dispense request

nodes.label: Dispense uses Prisma $transaction for atomic multi-item dispensing
nodes.norm_label: dispense uses prisma $transaction for atomic multi-item dispensing

nodes.label: Stock adjust computes newTotal = shelfCount + checkedOut (tracked: count CHECKED_OUT sub-items, non-tracked: totalQty - availableQty)
nodes.norm_label: stock adjust computes newtotal = shelfcount + checkedout (tracked: count checked_out sub-items, non-tracked: totalqty - availableqty)

nodes.label: Stock adjust creates ItemStatusLog even when status unchanged, recording qty change in reason
nodes.norm_label: stock adjust creates itemstatuslog even when status unchanged, recording qty change in reason

nodes.label: Stock adjust rejects request if shelf count equals current availableQty
nodes.norm_label: stock adjust rejects request if shelf count equals current availableqty

nodes.label: INSTRUCTOR role blocked from stock adjustment
nodes.norm_label: instructor role blocked from stock adjustment

nodes.label: ADJUSTMENT_REASONS hardcoded in dialog (LOST, DAMAGED_PENDING_REPAIR, COUNT_MISMATCH, DISPOSAL, OTHER)
nodes.norm_label: adjustment_reasons hardcoded in dialog (lost, damaged_pending_repair, count_mismatch, disposal, other)

nodes.label: Dialog shows computed newTotal preview with delta coloring (green for increase, red for decrease)
nodes.norm_label: dialog shows computed newtotal preview with delta coloring (green for increase, red for decrease)

nodes.label: stockAdjustSchema — shelfCount int >=0, reason enum AdjustmentReason, optional notes and imageEvidence
nodes.norm_label: stockadjustschema — shelfcount int >=0, reason enum adjustmentreason, optional notes and imageevidence

nodes.label: Fixed Asset fields in itemCreateSchema: serialNumber, model, purchaseDate, purchasePrice, vendor, warrantyEndDate, maintenanceCycleMonths, lastMaintenanceDate, manualUrl
nodes.norm_label: fixed asset fields in itemcreateschema: serialnumber, model, purchasedate, purchaseprice, vendor, warrantyenddate, maintenancecyclemonths, lastmaintenancedate, manualurl
